query: War and Peace page count English translation commonly cited
answer: War and Peace, translated by Constance Garnett, is commonly cited as having 1,408 pages in its English translation. This edition was published by Modern Library in 1994. The novel's length can vary by edition.

results.title: War and Peace (Modern Library): Leo Tolstoy, Constance Garnett
results.snippet: 1408 pages. Language: English. Publisher: Modern Library. Publication date: May 17, 1994. Reading age: 18 years and up. Dimensions: 5.49 x 2.21 x 8.04 inches.

results.title: War & Peace has 365 chapters - one for every day of the year. - Reddit
results.snippet: Currently only up to the first two books of March 1917 have been translated in English but they are on their way. They're also 1000 pages each
